description: Erol Baliyan discusses the significance of time and the artistry of watchmaking, highlighting Franck Muller's innovative approach to horology and its connection to the crypto world. He introduces the new Franck Muller and Solana limited timepiece, emphasizing its unique features and the collaboration's tribute to the Solana community.
topic_summary: At [t=0:00], Erol Baliyan presents the Franck Muller and Solana limited timepiece, discussing the importance of time and the artistry of watchmaking. He highlights the innovative features of the watch, including its connection to the Solana blockchain and the community it represents.
